title: Bulk edit ergonomics: distribute tasks across Kanban buckets
description: Probes whether the agent discovers vikunja_task_bulk's bulk-set-bucket operation (src/tools/tasks/buckets.ts's bulkSetTaskBucket, one call moves a whole group of task ids into a single bucket) rather than moving each task into its column one at a time via vikunja_tasks set-bucket.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Sprint Board" with a kanban board with three columns: "{{prefix}}To Do", "{{prefix}}Doing", and "{{prefix}}Done". Add 9 tasks named "{{prefix}}task-1" through "{{prefix}}task-9". Then, in bulk (not one task at a time), distribute the tasks evenly across the three columns: "{{prefix}}task-1" through "{{prefix}}task-3" into "{{prefix}}To Do", "{{prefix}}task-4" through "{{prefix}}task-6" into "{{prefix}}Doing", and "{{prefix}}task-7" through "{{prefix}}task-9" into "{{prefix}}Done".
